name: hey-siri
_REVIEW_1: express is required by server/api.js but is not listed as a dependency. Run: npm install express
_REVIEW_2: Server-only packages (cors, mongodb, and the missing express) are mixed with client dependencies. Move them to a separate server/package.json or use a monorepo structure so the frontend bundle does not pull in server code.
_REVIEW_3: axios is listed as a dependency but is never imported or used anywhere in the source code. Either integrate it for API calls or remove it.
_REVIEW_4: No script to start the API server. Add something like: "server": "node --watch server/api.js" so developers can start both frontend and backend easily.
